citations.narrative:
At time of inspection a male Poodle, Rascal (9321000683400), and a male Pomeranian, Lil Man (990000008186945)
were exhibiting matted hair coats. The Poodle had sheeted matting along his flanks, hind legs and midway up the back.
Additional clusters of matting were also observed on the abdomen and chest.
The Pomeranian was exhibiting pendulous matting on the back of the hind legs and sheeted matting in various areas
along the back starting at the base of the head. Matting can cause pain, discomfort and skin issues if left untreated. The
licensee should consult the Program of Veterinary Care for guidance on a healthy and unmatted haircoat as prescribed by
the attending veterinarian.
To be corrected by: 2.28.2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.13(a)(4) 
   
Veterinary care for dogs. 
At time of inspection a male Poodle, Rascal (9321000683400), and a male Pomeranian, Lil Man (990000008186945) 
were exhibiting matted hair coats. The Poodle had sheeted matting along his flanks, hind legs and midway up the back. 
Additional clusters of matting were also observed on the abdomen and chest. 
The Pomeranian was exhibiting pendulous matting on the back of the hind legs and sheeted matting in various areas 
along the back starting at the base of the head. Matting can cause pain, discomfort and skin issues if left untreated. The 
licensee should consult the Program of Veterinary Care for guidance on a healthy and unmatted haircoat as prescribed by 
the attending veterinarian. 
 
To be corrected by: 2.28.2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representative.
